Privacy notice, cleaning, rental policy: Privacy notice, cleaning, rental policy and terms
Title: Title
PREPARED BY VIAJERO CAR RENTAL, FOR THE: PREPARED BY VIAJERO CAR RENTAL, FOR THE PROTECTION OF ITS CLIENTS' DATA
Individual with Business Activity, with: Individual with Business Activity, with fiscal address at Blvd. Bernardo Quintana 8300, Centro Sur, 76090 Santiago de Querétaro, Qro., will process your personal data collected for identification, operation, administration and marketing purposes related to vehicle rental. If you do not express your opposition for your personal data to be processed, it will be understood that you have given your consent for it.
Personal data may be collected directly: Personal data may be collected directly —such as when provided personally—, or indirectly —through telephone directories, services or employment directories—, and include, among others: First and last names, gender, date of birth, address, landline and/or mobile phone, email, etc. Regarding financial data, in accordance with the exceptions set forth in articles 8, 10 and 37 of the Law, they are not considered to require express consent to be used.
The data will be used strictly for activ: The data will be used strictly for activities arising from providing you with a good or service, which in an illustrative but not limited manner are described below: Car rental, as well as the provision of services inherent to your leisure or business trips, updating and confirmation, for promotional, advertising, contracting and credit purposes, conducting studies on consumption habits and preferences, preparing financial options, collection and payment enforcement, and contacting you for any matter related to the services we provide or to this privacy policy. In accordance with the provisions of Article 37, Section III of the Law, personal data will not be transferred to third parties without consent, except for those companies that are part of our group or business partners.
You may exercise your ARCO rights (Acces: You may exercise your ARCO rights (Access, Rectification, Cancellation and Opposition) starting July 6, 2018, through the procedure we have implemented. Simply contact Mr. Juan de Dios Hernandez Resendiz, head of customer service, by phone at
drafting a document in Spanish, includin: drafting a document in Spanish, including your full name, a simple copy of your official ID or, in electronic media, a digital version (scan), an indication of the email or physical address designated for notifications and a contact phone number. Once done, within a maximum of 20 business days you will be informed of the validity of said request; if a response letter is sent to the indicated physical address, the twenty days will be considered fulfilled at the time the document is handed over to the postal service.
Lack of opposition for personal data to: Lack of opposition for personal data to be transferred as mentioned will be interpreted as having given your consent for it.
We reserve the right to make modificatio: We reserve the right to make modifications or updates to this privacy notice at any time, in response to legislative developments, internal policies or new requirements for the provision or offering of our services or products. These modifications will be available to the public through our website, email or in writing.
Smoke-free, dirt and unpleasant odors po: Smoke-free, dirt and unpleasant odors policy – Viajero Car Rental
delivers all our vehicles clean, ventila: delivers all our vehicles clean, ventilated and in optimal hygiene conditions for your comfort and for the next customers. Therefore, we have a
strict smoke-free, excessive dirt and un: strict smoke-free, excessive dirt and unpleasant odors policy
Returning the vehicle with tobacco smoke: Returning the vehicle with tobacco smoke, excessive dirt or strong odors requiring deep cleaning will result in a
charge, which will be applied to the pay: charge, which will be applied to the payment method registered in your rental contract.
What is considered dirt or odor that vio: What is considered dirt or odor that violates this policy?
Among others, the following are reasons: Among others, the following are reasons to apply the special cleaning charge:
Excessive stains from food, drinks, grea: Excessive stains from food, drinks, grease, mud, vomit or other difficult-to-remove residues.
Strong odors of chemicals, chlorine, moi: Strong odors of chemicals, chlorine, moisture, garbage or decomposing food.
Accumulation of pet hair, organic residu: Accumulation of pet hair, organic residues or insects due to lack of basic cleaning.
At the time of return, the vehicle is in: At the time of return, the vehicle is inspected by
If dirt or odor requiring deep cleaning: If dirt or odor requiring deep cleaning is detected,
and the condition of the vehicle will be: and the condition of the vehicle will be documented.
will be applied for deep cleaning and de: will be applied for deep cleaning and deodorization.
What can you do to avoid this charge?: What can you do to avoid this charge?
Do not smoke inside the vehicle under an: Do not smoke inside the vehicle under any circumstances.
Avoid consuming food or beverages that m: Avoid consuming food or beverages that may spill or leave strong odors.
Remove all trash and personal belongings: Remove all trash and personal belongings before returning the vehicle.
If traveling with pets, use covers, blan: If traveling with pets, use covers, blankets or accessories that protect the upholstery.
This policy aims to ensure that every ve: This policy aims to ensure that every vehicle from
is always delivered in the best possible: is always delivered in the best possible condition for all our customers.
The minimum age to rent a vehicle with: The minimum age to rent a vehicle with
is 21 years. A young driver fee applies: is 21 years. A young driver fee applies for customers between 21 and 24 years old, with a cost of
This fee may be subject to airport fees: This fee may be subject to airport fees and other applicable charges plus VAT.
The primary customer must present a vali: The primary customer must present a valid driver's license from their country of residence with a minimum of one year of seniority. Viajero Car Rental reserves the right to verify the license and deny the rental if it does not meet the guidelines. For additional drivers, only a valid license is required, without a minimum seniority.
A valid official photo ID must be presen: A valid official photo ID must be presented. For Mexican citizens, an INE/IFE with at least one year of seniority is required. For foreigners, a passport, Passport Card, FM2, FM3 or Permanent Residence is accepted.
Credit card in the renter's name: Credit card in the renter's name
It is essential to present a bank credit: It is essential to present a bank credit card in the renter's name to start the rental. The final payment can be made with a debit card. American Express, Visa and MasterCard are accepted. The card must have a minimum of one year of seniority. Viajero Car Rental may reject damaged, illegible cards or special program cards that are not compatible.
Viajero Car Rental reserves the right no: Viajero Car Rental reserves the right not to complete the rental if any of the requirements are not met or if any irregularity is detected in the documentation presented.
